case_title: ROMAN WILLIAMS VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ROMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00, DEFENDANT PRESENTED NO COMPETENCE EVIDENCE TO REBUT CLAIM. ADMITS CARRIER AND CONTACT WITH HOLDER BUT NONE WITH PERMISSIVE DRIVER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KAREN GOLDSTEIN, CLAIMS EXAMINER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE FOUND. SERVED DEC-27-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF ROMAN WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KAREN GOLDSTEIN (CLAIM EXAMINER). DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; DEPUTY OBTINALLA; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
